name: Check a placeholder in LYRASIS
fullName: Search libraries and books: Check a placeholder in LYRASIS

steps.name: Then  Add library screen is opened
When  Add library "LYRASIS Reads" on Add library screen
Then  Placeholder contains "Search" text in search field
